2605.29368.title: SURGENT: A Surgical Multi-Agent Assistance System Across the Perioperative Workflow
2605.29368.paper_summary: The intricate nature of modern surgical care necessitates intelligent systems that can synthesize extensive patient records, support collaborative decision-making, and provide transparent, auditable reasoning across the entire perioperative workflow. Although web-based Large Language Models (LLMs) possess advanced reasoning capabilities, they are ill-equipped for surgical applications due to critical limitations: input length constraints, incomplete memory management, and limited traceability. To address this issue, we present SURGENT, a surgical multi-agent assistance system that combines a Tree-of-Thought planner, multi-department collaboration agents, and retrieval-augmented reasoning with clinical guidelines and biomedical literature. SURGENT features a novel memory design that manages both long-term patient histories and short-term working summaries, enabling more complete, contextualized, and consistent reasoning. Experimental evaluations across five key perioperative tasks - case analysis, surgical plan simulation, safety monitoring, complication risk assessment, and rehabilitation guidance - show that SURGENT outperforms baseline LLMs and existing medical multi-agent frameworks, yielding recommendations more closely aligned with patient histories. Ablation studies further highlight the advantage of DeepSeek as a locally deployable backbone model, enabling privacy-preserving deployment without reliance on centralized services. These results position SURGENT as a practical and trustworthy advancement toward intelligent, equitable, and secure surgical assistance systems.
2605.29368.paper_summary_zh: 現代外科護理的複雜性需要智能系統，這些系統能夠綜合廣泛的病歷記錄，支持協作決策，並在整個圍手術工作流程中提供透明且可審計的推理。儘管基於網絡的大型語言模型（LLMs）具備先進的推理能力，但由於關鍵的限制，它們不適合用於外科應用：輸入長度限制、不完整的記憶管理以及有限的可追溯性。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了SURGENT，一個外科多代理協助系統，結合了思維樹規劃器、多部門協作代理以及與臨床指南和生物醫學文獻相結合的檢索增強推理。SURGENT具有一種新穎的記憶設計，能夠管理長期病歷和短期工作摘要，使推理更加完整、具上下文且一致。針對五個關鍵的圍手術任務進行的實驗評估——病例分析、外科計劃模擬、安全監控、併發症風險評估和康復指導——顯示SURGENT的表現優於基線LLMs和現有的醫療多代理框架，提供的建議與病歷更為一致。消融研究進一步突顯了DeepSeek作為可本地部署的骨幹模型的優勢，實現了不依賴集中服務的隱私保護部署。這些結果使SURGENT成為朝著智能、公平和安全的外科協助系統邁進的實用且值得信賴的進展。
2605.29368.author: Dongsheng Shi et.al.
2605.29368.authors: Dongsheng Shi, Yue Li, Xin Yi, Yongyi Cui, Huawei Feng, Linlin Wang
